code: import"./css/Skills.css";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const hardSkills=[{name:"Python",level:90},{name:"Java",level:60},{name:"JavaScript / React",level:80},{name:"Machine Learning",level:75},{name:"Web Development",level:85},{name:"Linux & Networks",level:70}];const softSkills=["Problem-solving","Teamwork & Collaboration","Project Management","Communication","Adaptability","Analytical mindset"];const Skills=()=>{return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"skills-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"hard-skills",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:"title",children:"Hard Skills"}),hardSkills.map((skill,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"skill",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h3",{className:"skill-title",children:[skill.name," ",/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"skill-level-text",children:["(",skill.level,"%)"]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"skill-bar",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"skill-progress",style:{width:"".concat(skill.level,"%")}})})]},index))]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"soft-skills",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:"title",children:"Soft Skills"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"badges-container",children:softSkills.map((skill,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"badge",children:skill},index))})]})]});};export default Skills;
